naive_method: quantile normalization of merged Gao-HCC + Dong-iCCA proteome

M2_combat_no_covariate.interpretation: contrast erased (batch==tumour type removed by construction), like per-cohort z-score

M2_combat_protect_tumortype.interpretation: tumour type perfectly confounded with batch -> design rank-deficient; standard ComBat (sva/pyComBat) aborts. Forced via pinv it is degenerate and does not recover the batch-free axis.
